summary: David Chen. Project: commercial_hotel in East Cape, BCS. Key program: 15 guest rooms, restaurant (200sqm), infinity pool (300sqm), spa (200sqm), reception, back-of-house, staff. Site: 15,000sqm property with steep slope on west side and stream through northeast corner — hydrologic study required. Budget signal: $2.5M USD stated, range implied $1.5M–$4M. Design engagement: specific program elements, sustainability interest (solar, greywater recycling), boutique positioning.
